summary: Comprehensive testing of Market Oracle AI platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend loads correctly with globe visualization and data display. One UI interaction issue identified with event popups.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns React app HTML instead of JSON API response
minor_bugs.impact: Root endpoint serves frontend instead of API metadata, but /api/health works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Event popup not appearing when clicking on red conflict markers
ui_bugs.description: 8 ACLED events are visible as red markers on globe, but click interactions don't trigger event popup with 'Simulate ASX Impact' button
ui_bugs.debug_info: Tooltip hover works, events data loaded in localStorage, but onPointClick handler not responding

passed_tests: Backend /api/data/acled endpoint returns 8 events in GeoJSON format
Backend /api/data/asx-prices returns 5 tickers (BHP.AX, RIO.AX, FMG.AX, CBA.AX, LYC.AX) with real prices
Backend /api/data/port-hedland returns HIGH congestion level with 14 vessels
Backend /api/simulate endpoint exists (returns 422 validation error for empty request)
Frontend globe loads with 3D earth visualization using globe.gl
Globe displays 8 ACLED conflict events as visible red markers
ASX ticker strip shows all 5 tickers with live prices and percentage changes
Port Hedland congestion badge displays HIGH status with 14 vessels in header
Instructions section present with Iran/Strait of Hormuz demo tip
Professional dark theme layout with proper spacing and contrast
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Globe event click interactions - the onPointClick handler in Globe.js component needs debugging. Events are visible but not clickable. This blocks the core demo flow of clicking events to trigger simulation.

success_percentage.backend: 83% (5/6 tests passed - minor root endpoint issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 features working - event click interaction blocked)
